title: SectionList Header
description: Create a grouped list of items using SectionList with custom section headers.
problemStatement:
Group your data! Use `<SectionList>` to display categories. Given `const sections = [{ title: 'Fruits', data: ['Apple'] }]`, render a custom header for each section showing its title.

**Requirement:** Use the `renderSectionHeader` prop to return a `Text` tag with a bold font.
hints: `SectionList` is perfect for lists with headers, like a contacts list grouped by letter.
expectedOutput: A list with a bold 'Fruits' header above the 'Apple' item
